creator: rannumgen@globaleyes.net
text:
1) create custom report
2) File/Add Report
3) Gnucash crashes

Fix: 

1) Update slib from version 3a4 to 3b1
2) recompile gnucash

==== reference ====
https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=446118

slib update PR assigned:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=137151
